item.title: 过去一周的 7 大精选 DEV 帖子 | Top 7 Featured DEV Posts from the Past Week
item.description:
开发团队的Michael Tharrington（他/他）

发表于 1 月 10 日

每个星期二，我们都会根据流量、参与度和一些编辑策划来汇总前一周的热门帖子。 典型的一周从星期一开始到星期日结束，但不用担心，我们会考虑本周晚些时候发布的帖子。

用图像理解 Git

受 Nico Riedmann 的“学习 git 概念，而不是命令”的启发， @nopenoshishi整理了一份很棒的 Git 系统结构指南，其中包含手绘图像！

提高面试机会

找工作总是一个艰难的经历。 在这里， @andrewbaisden描述了您可能采取的许多行动，以确保您踏上 IT 业务的大门。

数据库 101

对于那些没有探索过数据库的人来说，数据库可能是一个令人困惑和恐惧的话题。 减少 Docker 图像大小

在他们的宠物项目中将 Docker 镜像的大小减少了 97%， @kitarp29发现了一些真正有效的方法来降低 Docker 镜像的大小。 继续阅读，看看他们是如何做到的！

在 CSS 中绘制徽标插图是学习语言的来龙去脉的好方法。 在这篇文章中， @ratracegrad 将带领我们创建 Google 徽标。

在本文中， @cocoandrew探讨了如何在 Web 应用程序中使用 WebAssembly。

开发者博客

虽然开始起来可能很困难，但@nasirovelchin提出了博客对软件开发人员特别有益的几个原因。

这就是我们本周二的每周前 7 名！ 请关注本周的 dev.to 以获取每日内容和讨论……并确保在未来关注本系列。 你可能只是在其中！

安东尼奥迪莫塔 - 1月10日

一旦暂停，devteam 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，devteam 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，devteam 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 devteam 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是您可以用来标记 devteam 的操作：

降低 devteam 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

Unflagging devteam will restore default visibility to their posts. Unflagning devteam 将恢复他们帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Michael Tharrington (he/him) for The DEV Team

Posted on Jan 10

Every Tuesday we round up the previous week's top posts based on traffic, engagement, and a hint of editorial curation. The typical week starts on Monday and ends on Sunday, but don't worry, we take into account posts that are published later in the week.

Understanding Git with Images

Inspired by Nico Riedmann's "Learn git concepts, not commands", @nopenoshishi put together an awesome guide on Git’s system structure featuring hand drawn-images!

Improve Your Chances at Interviews

Looking for work is always a tough experience. Here, @andrewbaisden describes many actions you might take to make sure you get your foot in the door of the IT business.

Databases 101

Databases can be a confusing and scary topic for those who haven’t explored them. @danielhe4rt shares their learnings, letting us know what they find particularly fascinating about databases.

Reduce Docker Image Sizes

Reducing the size of the Docker image in their pet project by 97%, @kitarp29 uncovered some really effective methods for bringing down the size of Docker images. Read on to see how they made it happen!

Google Logo in CSS

Illustrating logos in CSS is a great way to learn the ins and outs of the language. In this post, @ratracegrad walks us through creating the Google logo.

A Guide to WebAssembly

WebAssembly (Wasm) is a low-level binary format that is designed to be faster and more efficient than traditional JavaScript. In this article, @cocoandrew explores how to use WebAssembly in a web application.

Blogging for Developers

Though it can be difficult to get going, @nasirovelchin puts forth several reasons why blogging is particularly beneficial to software developers.

That's it for our weekly Top 7 for this Tuesday! Keep an eye on dev.to this week for daily content and discussions...and be sure to keep an eye on this series in the future. You might just be in it!

Antonio Di Motta - Jan 10

Once suspended, devteam will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, devteam will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by devteam will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If devteam is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag devteam:

Make all posts by devteam less visible

devteam consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging devteam will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: michaeltharrington

item.title: Apple Watch Series 7 铝金属 | Apple Watch Series 7 Aluminum
item.description:
梅尔文里奥斯

发表于 1 月 11 日

这款设备纤薄、轻巧且设计精美，可满足所有需求。 查看短信和电子邮件，在手腕上接听电话并为会议计时，通过跟踪您的步数和锻炼保持活跃，使用 Apple Pay 随时随地购买东西，让 Siri 帮助您完成更多工作。

一旦暂停，melvinrios009 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，melvinrios009 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，melvinrios009 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 melvinrios009 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 melvinrios009 的方法：

降低 melvinrios009 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 melvinrios009 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Melvin Rios

Posted on Jan 11

Apple Watch Series 7 Aluminum is the perfect timepiece for a refined sense of style in addition to being functionally advanced and wonderfully crafted. Slim, lightweight and exquisitely designed, this device does it all. See texts and emails, take a call on your wrist with timekeeping for meetings, stay active by tracking your steps and exercise, buy things on the go with Apple Pay and let Siri help you get more done.

Gülsen Keskin - Apr 2 '22

Abhishek Thapliyal - Apr 1 '22

item.title: 低代码平台需要产品设计师/UXUI | Product Designer / UXUI Wanted for Low-Code Platform
item.description:
你相信时间比金钱更宝贵吗？
结果是高效率。

我们正在寻找 UX/UI 产品设计师加入我们的团队，帮助领导参与并与开发人员合作以建立您的愿景。 我们致力于解决通常专注于企业、企业对企业客户的大型软件问题。

作为一名设计师，您将从事以 Web 应用程序为中心的复杂的、工作流驱动的设计。 理想的候选人具有高度的好奇心和对我们客户的同情心，对创造最佳客户体验的热情，以及对挖掘和分析数据和研究以推动从概念到产品发布的最佳设计解决方案的热情。 我们还在寻找具有强大构思、信息架构、原型制作和视觉设计技能的候选人。

您将与我们的前端开发人员合作，使用最新技术打造令人惊叹的体验。 本职位总部设在Yogyakarta, DIY。

设计技巧

  • 角色发展
  • 线框图/交互设计
  • 工作流程图/旅程图
  • 信息架构/分类创建
  • 实施设计系统
  • 更新和维护组件和样式库、设计系统
  • 使用 Figma 构建原型
  • 运行可用性测试

你会做什么

  • 使用 Figma（和 FigJam）布局创意来捕捉设计创意并准备任何支持流程来传达您的想法。
  • 向内部和外部利益相关者展示并捍卫您的设计。
  • 记录您的设计，以便向开发人员清楚地传达需求。
  • 审查实施的设计以确保质量和对规范的遵守。
  • 与其他设计师合作维护产品的模式和样式库。
  • 这份工作最重要的要求是沟通。 当然，最终衡量您的标准是输出的质量和及时性，但我们看到许多有能力的顾问都失败了； 他们失败不是因为他们不会设计，而是因为他们不善于沟通状态或与团队合作以实现共同目标。

我们的追求

  • 注重细节的人，可以提出要求并制作出其他人可以理解的像素完美设计。
  • 一个清晰的沟通者，可以清楚地表达问题并提出具有强烈原因的设计。 如果你不喜欢在人群面前讲话，或者不喜欢与其他人互动，那么这份工作不适合你。
  • 自我激励的人，他们知道自己需要完成工作，不需要持续的监督或监督。
  • 具有以下技术的经验/知识也是非常可取的，但不是必需的：HTML、Javascript、CSS

如果您没有勾选上面的每个方框，我们仍然鼓励您申请。 我们正在建立一支多元化的团队，其技能相互平衡和互补。

自 2013 年以来，RUN System 专门为制造、分销、贸易和服务行业的大中型企业提供 ERP 软件解决方案。
这不是 ERP，它是运行系统： www.youtube.com/watch ?v=5d94VLAVvj4
运行系统记录： www.youtube.com/watch ?v=uiezxm3Q7_Y

你的作品集应展示以用户为中心的设计过程、设计思维以及最终设计解决方案的示例。

立即加入 Run System 👉 s.id/helloken

永恒的开发帖子...

我多年前就希望知道的 Git 概念

开发人员使用最多的技术不是 Javascript。

它不是 Python 或 HTML。

它甚至很少在面试中被提及或被列为工作的先决条件。

当然，我说的是 Git 和版本控制。

理查德托雷斯 - 22 年 9 月 18 日

阿尔伯特⚔️⛓️👨‍💻-22 年 9 月 11 日

暂停后，kenniko 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，kenniko 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，kenniko 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 kenniko 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 kenniko：

降低 kenniko 发布的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

Unflagging kenniko will restore default visibility to their posts. Unflagning kenniko 将恢复他们帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Do you believe time is more valuable than money?
Run System helps ordinary companies to have an equal opportunity with "Fortune 2000" companies to implement world-class productivity systems. Big-time efficiency is the result.

We are looking for a UX/UI Product Designer to join our team and help lead engagements and work with developers to get your visions built. We work on big software problems typically focused on enterprise, business-to-business clients.

As a designer you will work on complex, workflow-driven designs centered on web applications. The ideal candidate has a high level of curiosity, and empathy for our customers, a passion for creating the best customer experience, and a zeal for mining and analyzing data and research to drive optimal design solutions from concept to product launch. We’re also looking for a candidate with strong ideation, information architecture, prototyping, and visual design skills.

You will work with our front-end developers to build amazing experiences using the latest technology. This position is headquartered in Yogyakarta, DIY.

Design skills

  • Figma (or Sketch)
  • Persona development
  • Wireframing/interaction design
  • Workflow diagramming/journey mapping
  • Information architecture/taxonomy creation
  • Implementing design system
  • Updating and maintaining component and style libraries, design systems
  • Build prototypes with Figma
  • Run usability tests

What you will do

  • Layout ideas using Figma (and FigJam) to capture the design ideas and prepare any supporting flows to communicate your ideas.
  • Present and defend your designs to both internal and external stakeholders.
  • Document your designs to clearly communicate requirements to the developers.
  • Review implemented designs to ensure quality and adherence to the specifications.
  • Work with other designers to maintain the pattern and style libraries for the product.
  • The most important requirement of the job is communication. Of course, you are ultimately measured on the quality and timeliness of your output, but we have seen many competent consultants fail; they failed not because they could not design, but because they were not good at communicating status or working with the team to achieve common goals.

What we seek

  • Someone with an eye for detail, who can take requirements and produce pixel-perfect designs that others understand.
  • A clear communicator that can articulate problems and present designs with strong why. If you don’t like to speak in front of groups, or don’t like interacting with other humans, then this job isn’t for you.
  • Self-motivated individuals who know they need to get a job done and do not require constant hand-holding or oversight.
  • Experience/knowledge in the following technologies are also highly desirable but not required: HTML, Javascript, CSS

If you don’t tick every box above, we’d still encourage you to apply. We’re building a diverse team whose skills balance and complement one another.

Global Sukses Solusi was initiated in 2013 and operates under the brand name “RUN System”. Since 2013, RUN System has specialized in providing ERP software solutions for medium to large-scale businesses in the manufacturing, distribution, trading, and service industries.
The main strength of RUN System is our extensive expertise and experience in planning, designing, building, and implementing Information Technology Solutions for all integrated business processes.

It's not ERP, It's Run System: www.youtube.com/watch?v=5d94VLAVvj4
Run System track record: www.youtube.com/watch?v=uiezxm3Q7_Y

Run System is an Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) employer and does not discriminate based on race, color, national origin, religion, gender, age, veteran status, political affiliation, sexual orientation, marital status, or disability.

*Please include your portfolio in your application. Your portfolio should show examples of the user-centered design process, design thinking, as well as your final design solutions.

Join Run System NOW 👉 s.id/helloken

Timeless DEV post...

Git Concepts I Wish I Knew Years Ago

The most used technology by developers is not Javascript.

It's not Python or HTML.

It hardly even gets mentioned in interviews or listed as a pre-requisite for jobs.

I'm talking about Git and version control of course.

Richard Torres - Sep 18 '22

Albert⚔️⛓️👨‍💻 - Sep 11 '22
